summary: Frontend testing completed for AdAdda homepage new features: Hero Carousel, Floating Contact buttons, and Navbar Contact dropdown. All requested features are working correctly.

details: Carousel displays on homepage with 3 slides
Auto-scroll working (5 second interval) - verified via visual screenshots
Previous/Next arrow buttons navigate between slides correctly
Dot indicators show current slide and allow click navigation
Smooth opacity transitions between slides
Book Now button navigates to /book-now (redirects to /login for unauthenticated users - expected behavior)
Red phone button visible on left side
Phone popup shows two numbers: +91 8800 330 000 and 011-4033 0000
Green WhatsApp button visible on left side
WhatsApp popup shows link to wa.me/918800330000
Popups close correctly via X button
Vertical red 'Call Back' tab visible on right side
Callback form popup shows with name input, phone input, and submit button
Form inputs are fillable
Direct call link shown in popup
Contact Us button visible in navbar
Dropdown shows phone and WhatsApp links
Dropdown closes when clicking outside
Features section (1000+ Newspapers, 200+ Cities, Same Day Publishing, Best Prices) renders below carousel
Popular Ad Categories section with 6 categories renders correctly
How It Works section with 4 steps renders correctly
Why Choose AdAdda section renders correctly
CTA section at bottom renders correctly
Page scrolls normally
Carousel displays properly on mobile (390x844)
Navigation arrows work on mobile
Floating contact buttons visible and functional on mobile
Bottom contact bar visible on mobile only
Phone popup works on mobile

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Carousel uses opacity transitions which is smooth but all slides remain in DOM
FloatingContact component properly manages popup state to show only one popup at a time
test_credentials: No auth needed for homepage testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage carousel and floating contact features are working correctly. Book Now button redirects to /login for unauthenticated users which is expected behavior based on BookNow.js useEffect. Auto-scroll interval is 5 seconds. Mobile responsiveness is good.
